summary: Casos Image Upload feature testing completed. All 25 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with image thumbnails, lightbox modal, and image picker components working correctly.

minor.issue: Cache-Control header returns 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' instead of 'max-age=3600' as documented in code - this is actually more secure but differs from code comment

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby - accessibility improvement (existing issue from previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/casos - Create case with JSON body: PASSED
GET /api/casos/image-proxy - Proxy serve image from Object Storage: PASSED
POST /api/casos/{id}/comments - Add comment to case: PASSED
POST /api/casos/{id}/comments/{comment_id}/images - Upload image to comment: PASSED
Security: image-proxy rejects path traversal (.. in path): PASSED
Security: image-proxy rejects wrong condominium paths (403): PASSED
Security: image-proxy rejects missing/invalid token (401): PASSED
GET /api/casos/{id} - Case detail returns attachments array and comments with images: PASSED
Frontend: CasosResident.jsx shows image thumbnails via proxy URLs: VERIFIED
Frontend: Clicking thumbnail opens lightbox modal with full image: VERIFIED
Frontend: Creating a case with images (ImagePicker component): VERIFIED
Frontend: Adding comment with images: VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* prefixed cases during backend testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Casos Image Upload feature fully implemented and tested. Known test case 'Test imagen' (ID: 8b63e1e1-4de2-4dce-8890-870b8f10c0c7) has 1 attachment and 1 comment with 1 image. Image proxy endpoint at GET /api/casos/image-proxy accepts 'path' and 'token' query params. Frontend uses toProxyUrl() helper to convert storage paths to proxy URLs.

backend_apis.POST /api/casos create case: PASSED - Creates case with title, description, category, priority, visibility
backend_apis.POST /api/casos/{id}/attachments upload: PASSED - Uploads JPEG image to case
backend_apis.GET /api/casos/image-proxy success: PASSED - Returns image binary with Content-Type
backend_apis.GET /api/casos/image-proxy absolute path: PASSED - Returns 400 for paths starting with '/'
backend_apis.POST /api/casos/{id}/comments add: PASSED - Creates comment with images array
backend_apis.GET /api/casos/{id} detail with comment: PASSED - Returns comments with images array

frontend_ui.lightbox_modal: VERIFIED - data-testid='image-lightbox' opens on thumbnail click
frontend_ui.form_fields: VERIFIED - Title, description, category, priority, visibility all present
